summary: Comprehensive testing of GRS Global Jobs page features completed. All core features working: job row click opens details dialog, edit mode (status/notes), stone grouping, memo upload button. Fixed 1 backend bug (StoneResponse missing certificate_group field).

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: StoneResponse model missing certificate_group field causing grouped stones to not show group number in API response
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added 'certificate_group: Optional[int] = None' to StoneResponse model

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (14 jobs, 5 clients)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Jobs page fully functional. Job #14 has 3 stones: 2 in Group 99, 1 in Group 100. Edit mode tested with status change to 'Sent to Lab' and notes update. Stone grouping creates sequential group numbers. Memo upload uses hidden file input triggered by button click.
test_flows_completed: Navigate to Jobs page from sidebar - PASS
Jobs table displays all columns (Job #, Client, Branch, Service, Stones, Value, Fee, Status, Shipment) - PASS
Click job row opens details dialog - PASS
Job details dialog shows job info, stones table, Print/Edit buttons - PASS
Edit mode: status dropdown with 8 valid statuses - PASS
Edit mode: notes textarea editable - PASS
Edit mode: Save Changes persists data - PASS
Stone grouping: checkbox selection shows Group button - PASS
Stone grouping: confirmation dialog appears - PASS
Stone grouping: creates certificate group badge after save - PASS
Upload Memo button visible and clickable - PASS

mocked_apis.file_upload: Memo upload stores base64 in MongoDB instead of cloud storage
